tasks.label: My share of the group project
Teammate's share (just dumped on me)

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their part today due to a conflict, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my share this afternoon.
I've made solid progress on my share, but teammate A is still urgently asking for help with their part.
I realized setting a boundary with teammate_A didn't damage our trust, even though accepting their work just tightened my own deadline.
Teammate A accepted my boundary without resentment and promised to handle their part, resolving the immediate conflict despite their apology.
I've advanced my project progress to 0.62 after two hours, yet I remain fatigued with a sleep debt and moderate stress.
I failed to finish my group project share by the 19:00 deadline, leaving it at 70% progress despite working for an hour and a half.
My teammate received my message about missing the 19:00 deadline, and I am now aware they are processing this delay while I remain fatigued.
After working 1.5 hours, I advanced my project share to 77% progress, yet I remain fatigued with a sleep debt and moderate stress.
Teammate_A noticed my delayed progress and marked the task as returned to me, signaling they are waiting for my completion.
I made slight progress on my project share but remain fatigued with a sleep debt and moderate stress.
Teammate_A confirmed the returned task is resolved, indicating they are waiting for my final input despite my fatigue.
My progress increased slightly to 0.87, yet my energy is depleted and stress remains high despite the team waiting for my input.
